texto: Still, truth is how I remember it now. In a way, I am changing the past from my desk here in the future as I write. It always happens like this. This is how we all tell our story.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a J.D. Radke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Still, truth is how I remember it now. In a way, I am changing the past from my desk here in the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, storytelling, verdade pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de verdade.

texto: If I were given a choice, I would stand by Eve and eat that forbidden apple once again. Why? I know there is beauty and meaning and significance in the complexity of our lives on earth. Otherwise, we are just animals. I prefer us to be human.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de J.D. Radke que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “If I were given a choice, I would stand by Eve and eat that forbidden apple once again. Why? I kn…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, choices, humanity, com foco em humanity.
